s2.ptxt: Apply high-temperature grease to the planetary gears and pin parts of the planetary shaft.
Install the 3 planetary gears to the motor terminal starter kit.
Apply high-temperature grease to the plate washer and the armature shaft.
Install the starter armature assembly to the starter commutator end frame assembly.
Using snap ring pliers, install the plate washer and a new snap ring.
Using vernier calipers, measure the snap ring.
If the length is greater than the maximum, replace the snap ring with a new one.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL STARTER COMMUTATOR END FRAME COVER

s2.ptxt: Install the starter commutator end frame cover to the starter commutator end frame assembly.
Align the claw of the armature plate with the groove inside the starter yoke assembly, and install the starter armature plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL STARTER COMMUTATOR END FRAME ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Align the starter commutator end frame rubber with the groove of the starter yoke assembly.
Install the starter commutator end frame assembly to the starter yoke assembly.

atten3.ptxt: The magnet of the starter yoke assembly may attract the starter armature assembly when the starter commutator end frame assembly is installed, causing the magnet to break.

s2.ptxt: Align the claw of the starter yoke with the groove inside the motor terminal starter kit.
Install the starter yoke with the 2 through bolts.
Apply high-temperature grease to the plunger and the hook.
Hang the plunger hook of the repair service starter kit to the drive lever hook.
Install the plunger and the return spring.
Install the repair service starter kit with the 2 screws.
Connect the lead wire to terminal C with the nut.
